title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.050 - Who may be made codefendant
text:
524.050.  Who may be made codefendant. — The person from or through whom the defendant claims title to the premises may, on motion, be made a codefendant.
(RSMo 1939 § 1533) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1369; 1919 § 1819; 1909 § 2386 
Tenant served with summons in ejectment to notify landlord, penalty, 441.090
